Author: Nadya, Kagekazu
Name: Tidy Chat
Description:
Trim the messages FFXIV dumps into your chat log.

  - Master filters for System, Progress, Loot, Obtained, Crafting, and Gathering
  - Toggles for currencies, FC and retainer messages, level-ups, mount unlocks, orchestrion lines, deep dungeon pomanders, combat log categories, and more
  - Shorter rewrites for instance entry, commendations, Novice Network, and treasure dungeon text
  - Copies /say quest dialogue to your clipboard; can block emote spam from others
  - Player whitelist, chat history deduplication, per-tomestone hides, and debug logging
Punchline: Cut down FFXIV chat spam with per-message toggles and shorter system lines.
